FINANCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive financial counseling services including: -Budget and debt management -Debt repayment strategies -HUD-approved mortgage, delinquency, and default resolution consolidation -Home purchase guidance -Bankruptcy counseling and post-bankruptcy counseling -Student loan counseling 700 Taylor Road Suite 150 Gahanna, OH 43230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 5am-4pm, Friday 5am-3pm Email (888) 461-2927 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CARECONNECT USA HELPLINES FOR FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides multiple helplines where people can speak with experts and get connected to resources for financial issues, including bankruptcy, credit score improvement, foreclosure, mortgage default and delinquency, and debt management for student loans, credit cards, medical bills, and tax-related debt. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 734-2585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists clients in meeting the Bankruptcy Abuse Prevention and Consumer Protection Act of 2005 (BAPCPA) requirements for Pre-Bankruptcy Counseling and Pre-Discharge Debtor Education. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL FOUNDATION FOR CREDIT COUNSELING CREDIT COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers financial reviews and education in person, over the phone, or online. Services include: -Credit and debt counseling -Bankruptcy counseling -Housing counseling (pre-purchase, foreclosure prevention, and reverse mortgage) -Student loan debt counseling -Debt management plans -Credit report reviews -Foreclosure information -Tips for first-time veteran and military homebuyers 2033 K Street NW Suite 425 Washington, DC 20006 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 5am-2pm Email (800) 388-2227 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
